<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\Command; use PHPUnit\TextUI\Help; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class ShowHelpCommand implements Command { private int $shellExitCode; public function __construct(int $shellExitCode) { $this->shellExitCode = $shellExitCode; } public function execute(): Result { return Result::from( (new Help)->generate(), $this->shellExitCode, ); } }
